headline: 3 Bank Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Banks serve as the backbone of the economy, facilitating lending, deposits, and financial services that keep businesses and consumers moving forward. Furthermore, economic conditions have supported loan growth and fee income, a trend that has enabled the banking industry to return 13.7% over the past six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 was up 4.1%.
